Package dev.morphia.critter.parser.gizmo

Class GizmoExtensions

java.lang.Object
dev.morphia.critter.parser.gizmo.GizmoExtensions
public class GizmoExtensions extends Object
Static utility methods that bridge ASM annotation nodes and Morphia type data with the Gizmo bytecode generation API.

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    static io.quarkus.gizmo.ResultHandle
    annotationBuilder(org.objectweb.asm.tree.AnnotationNode annotationNode, io.quarkus.gizmo.MethodCreator creator)
    Emits Gizmo bytecode that instantiates the Morphia annotation represented by the given ASM annotation node.
    static Class<?>
    asClass(org.objectweb.asm.Type type, ClassLoader classLoader)
    Resolves an ASM Type to a Class using the given class loader.
    static Type
    attributeType(Class<?> type, String name)
    Returns the generic return type of the named annotation element method.
    static io.quarkus.gizmo.ResultHandle
    emitTypeData(dev.morphia.mapping.codec.pojo.TypeData<?> data, io.quarkus.gizmo.MethodCreator methodCreator)
    Emits Gizmo bytecode that constructs a TypeData instance matching the given type data.
    static io.quarkus.gizmo.ResultHandle
    load(io.quarkus.gizmo.MethodCreator creator, Class<?> type, Object value)
    Emits Gizmo bytecode that loads the given value as the specified class type.
    static io.quarkus.gizmo.ResultHandle
    load(io.quarkus.gizmo.MethodCreator creator, Type type, Object value)
    Emits Gizmo bytecode that loads the given value as the specified Type.
    static String
    rawType(Type type)
    Returns the ASM type descriptor for the raw (erased) form of the given Type.
    static void
    setBuilderValues(org.objectweb.asm.tree.AnnotationNode annotationNode, io.quarkus.gizmo.MethodCreator creator, io.quarkus.gizmo.ResultHandle local)
    Populates the annotation builder with values from the ASM annotation node.
    static dev.morphia.mapping.codec.pojo.TypeData<?>
    typeDataFromType(org.objectweb.asm.Type type, ClassLoader classLoader)
    Creates a TypeData from the given ASM type with no type parameters.
    static dev.morphia.mapping.codec.pojo.TypeData<?>
    typeDataFromType(org.objectweb.asm.Type type, ClassLoader classLoader, List<dev.morphia.mapping.codec.pojo.TypeData<?>> typeParameters)
    Creates a TypeData from the given ASM type with explicit type parameters.

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    clone, equals, finalize, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Method Details

    • annotationBuilder

      public static io.quarkus.gizmo.ResultHandle annotationBuilder(org.objectweb.asm.tree.AnnotationNode annotationNode, io.quarkus.gizmo.MethodCreator creator)
      Emits Gizmo bytecode that instantiates the Morphia annotation represented by the given ASM annotation node.
      Parameters:
      annotationNode - the ASM annotation node to convert
      creator - the Gizmo method creator in which the bytecode is emitted
      Returns:
      a result handle for the constructed annotation instance

    • asClass

      public static Class<?> asClass(org.objectweb.asm.Type type, ClassLoader classLoader)
      Resolves an ASM Type to a Class using the given class loader.
      Parameters:
      type - the ASM type to resolve
      classLoader - the class loader used to locate the class
      Returns:
      the corresponding Java class
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the class cannot be found

    • setBuilderValues

      public static void setBuilderValues(org.objectweb.asm.tree.AnnotationNode annotationNode, io.quarkus.gizmo.MethodCreator creator, io.quarkus.gizmo.ResultHandle local)
      Populates the annotation builder with values from the ASM annotation node.
      Parameters:
      annotationNode - the ASM annotation node whose values should be applied
      creator - the Gizmo method creator in which the bytecode is emitted
      local - the result handle referencing the annotation builder instance

    • emitTypeData

      public static io.quarkus.gizmo.ResultHandle emitTypeData(dev.morphia.mapping.codec.pojo.TypeData<?> data, io.quarkus.gizmo.MethodCreator methodCreator)
      Emits Gizmo bytecode that constructs a TypeData instance matching the given type data.
      Parameters:
      data - the type data to emit
      methodCreator - the Gizmo method creator in which the bytecode is emitted
      Returns:
      a result handle for the constructed TypeData instance

    • rawType

      public static String rawType(Type type)
      Returns the ASM type descriptor for the raw (erased) form of the given Type.
      Parameters:
      type - the type to erase
      Returns:
      the ASM descriptor string for the raw type

    • attributeType

      public static Type attributeType(Class<?> type, String name)
      Returns the generic return type of the named annotation element method.
      Parameters:
      type - the annotation class containing the element
      name - the name of the annotation element
      Returns:
      the generic return type of the element method
      Throws:
      RuntimeException - if the element method cannot be found

    • load

      public static io.quarkus.gizmo.ResultHandle load(io.quarkus.gizmo.MethodCreator creator, Type type, Object value)
      Emits Gizmo bytecode that loads the given value as the specified Type.
      Parameters:
      creator - the Gizmo method creator in which the bytecode is emitted
      type - the target type
      value - the value to load
      Returns:
      a result handle for the loaded value

    • load

      public static io.quarkus.gizmo.ResultHandle load(io.quarkus.gizmo.MethodCreator creator, Class<?> type, Object value)
      Emits Gizmo bytecode that loads the given value as the specified class type.
      Parameters:
      creator - the Gizmo method creator in which the bytecode is emitted
      type - the target class type
      value - the value to load
      Returns:
      a result handle for the loaded value

    • typeDataFromType

      public static dev.morphia.mapping.codec.pojo.TypeData<?> typeDataFromType(org.objectweb.asm.Type type, ClassLoader classLoader, List<dev.morphia.mapping.codec.pojo.TypeData<?>> typeParameters)
      Creates a TypeData from the given ASM type with explicit type parameters.
      Parameters:
      type - the ASM type to convert
      classLoader - the class loader used to resolve the type
      typeParameters - the list of generic type parameters
      Returns:
      a TypeData representing the type with its parameters

    • typeDataFromType

      public static dev.morphia.mapping.codec.pojo.TypeData<?> typeDataFromType(org.objectweb.asm.Type type, ClassLoader classLoader)
      Creates a TypeData from the given ASM type with no type parameters.
      Parameters:
      type - the ASM type to convert
      classLoader - the class loader used to resolve the type
      Returns:
      a TypeData representing the raw type
